details.effect: [evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Put 2 Fairy tokens into your EX area.

[fanfare] Banish 2 cards named Puppet from your EX area: Put a Lloyd token into your EX area. [act] [engage]: Select a Puppet on your field and give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1, Storm, and Bane. Activate only if there are at least 3 Puppetry cards in your cemetery.

[fanfare] Put a Remnant of Hollowness token into your EX area. [act] [cost00]: The next Loot card you play this turn costs 2 less. Activate only twice per turn. [act] Banish an Octrice, Omen of Usurpation from your cemetery: Put a Gilded Blade, Gilded Goblet, or Gilded Boots token into your EX area.

While there are at least 10 Academic cards in your cemetery, this has Storm. [fanfare] Discard 2 Academic cards: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 5 damage and draw 2 cards. At the start of your end phase, if there are at least 5 Academic cards in your cemetery, summon an Anne's Summoning token.
Ward. [fanfare] [cost02]: If Overflow is active for you, shuffle your deck, then put the top card into your EX area. It costs 0 to play this turn. [lastwords] Give your leader [defense]+2.

[fanfare] Discard a card: Reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal 2 followers that cost 3 or less. Summon them. Shuffle the rest and put them on the bottom of your deck. At the start of your end phase, Necrocharge (20) - Evolve this follower.
[evolve] [cost05]: Evolve this. Whenever your leader's defense decreases during your turn, if it's at least the 4th time this turn, evolve this. [fanfare] Deal 1 damage to your leader.

Ward. [fanfare] Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may summon a follower with Ward that costs 2 or less from among them. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. [act] [engage]: Select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it. Activate only if there are at least 3 followers on your field with Ward.

While your leader's defense is 10 or less, this has Drain. On Evolve - Choose 1. (1) Select another follower on the field and give it [attack]+2/[defense]-2. (2) Put a Ravenous Sweetness token into your EX area.
